# Amplifier Module Context Simple

Basic message list context manager for conversation state.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11+
- Part of the Amplifier framework ecosystem

## Development
```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
python -m pytest
```

## Structure
This is an Amplifier context module that provides simple context management.

## Conventions
- Follow existing code patterns
- Include type hints
- Write docstrings for public functions
